question_text: A light bulb uses 60 watts of power. What does this tell you about the bulb?

options.label: A
options.text: It uses 60 joules of energy per second

options.label: B
options.text: It uses 60 joules of energy per hour

options.label: D
options.text: It costs 60 pounds per year to run

correct_answer: It uses 60 joules of energy per second
explanation: Power is measured in watts, and one watt means one joule of energy used per second. So a 60 W bulb uses 60 J every second.
